title: helichrysum phaceloma
intro: Helichrysum phaceloma, also known as the Small Yellow Everlast or Helichrysum, is a perennial herb native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum phaceloma include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies in the form of essential oil, capsules, or tea, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
